overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character crosses intersections and walks along sidewalks beneath elevated highways, passing holographic billboards and street lights in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: character turns right onto sidewalk after crossing the intersection
black car passes by on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right onto the sidewalk, walking past neon signs

notable_agents.action: walking across the intersection in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement for All Foods with red mascot character
raised concrete highway structure spanning the intersection above
yellow zebra crossing lines painted on the asphalt
tall building with illuminated yellow facade and vertical windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection at night, dominated by a large holographic All Foods billboard on the left. The character crosses the street, turns right onto the sidewalk, and begins walking alongside a modern yellow-lit building while a car passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city sidewalk with commercial buildings

events.description: Sweet 2 Speed billboard becomes visible on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing street lamps and neon signs on the left

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with metal railings separating sidewalk from elevated structure
green neon billboard advertising Sweet 2 Speed with racing car imagery
tall modern street lamp with bright white LED light

segments.scene_description: Walking along the neon-lit sidewalk, the character passes by the yellow building now on the left and a concrete retaining wall on the right. A new billboard advertising Sweet 2 Speed appears on the left building, while occasional pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with traffic lights and overpass

events.description: character stops at red traffic light waiting to cross the street
traffic light changes to green and character begins crossing the road
moving from sidewalk onto crosswalk and approaching the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, stopping at a red light, then crossing the street toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: standing at crosswalk waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red then green light
large concrete bridge structure with vehicles passing overhead
futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk, the character approaches an intersection with a traffic light. After waiting for the light to turn green, the character crosses the street while a large overpass bridge looms ahead. The distant city skyline is visible through the night haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: moving from open intersection to covered area beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: weathered concrete wall with large white and blue graffiti tags and street art
red and white metal railing separating sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: Now walking beneath the massive overpass structure, the scene becomes more enclosed and industrial. The right side features a concrete wall covered in graffiti, while vehicles pass by on the left. The area is quieter with no pedestrians visible, creating a more isolated atmosphere under the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant neon-lit city center that gradually transitions into a secluded industrial underpass. It begins at a futuristic urban intersection dominated by a large holographic All Foods billboard, following the character as they cross the street and walk alongside a yellow-lit building. As the character continues down the sidewalk, the environment shifts to include a concrete retaining wall and a Sweet 2 Speed advertisement while pedestrians pass in the opposite direction. The scene then opens up at a traffic light, where the character crosses toward a distant, hazy skyline before the view is overtaken by a massive overpass bridge. Finally, the atmosphere becomes more enclosed and isolated as the camera moves beneath the bridge, passing graffiti-covered concrete walls and passing vehicles in a quieter, industrial setting.
